API Review Meeting - Raw Notes
Yesterday afternoon, around 3pm

Attendees: Sarah (tech lead), Mike (backend), Lisa (frontend), Tom (DevOps)

Discussion points:
- Discussed API versioning strategy for upcoming releases
- Current v1 endpoints are becoming difficult to maintain
- Decided to deprecate v1 endpoints by end of Q2 2026
- Timeline gives clients 3 months to migrate
- Agreed on new authentication flow for v2.3
- OAuth2 with JWT tokens will be required
- New rate limiting policies: 1000 req/hour for free tier, 10k for paid
- Backward compatibility maintained through v2.2

Action items:
- Mike: Draft migration guide by end of week
- Lisa: Update frontend SDK to support v2.3 auth
- Tom: Set up staging environment for v2.3 testing
- Sarah: Communicate deprecation plan to stakeholders

arguments.content:
# API Review Meeting Notes

## Meeting Information

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Date** | March 23, 2026 |
| **Time** | 15:00 - 16:30 (approximate) |
| **Location** | Conference Room B / Virtual |
| **Meeting Type** | API Versioning & v2.3 Planning |

---

## Participants

| Name | Role | Department |
|------|------|------------|
| Sarah | Tech Lead | Engineering |
| Mike | Backend Engineer | Backend Team |
| Lisa | Frontend Engineer | Frontend Team |
| Tom | DevOps Engineer | Infrastructure |

---

## Discussion Points

### 1. API Versioning Strategy
- Reviewed current challenges with maintaining v1 endpoints
- Identified technical debt accumulating in legacy endpoint code
- Discussed client migration patterns and timeline requirements

### 2. v1 Endpoint Deprecation Plan
- **Decision:** Deprecate all v1 endpoints by end of Q2 2026 (June 30, 2026)
- **Migration Window:** 3 months for client migration
- **Backward Compatibility:** v2.2 endpoints will remain stable during transition

### 3. v2.3 Authentication Changes
- **New Standard:** OAuth2 with JWT tokens will be required for all v2.3 endpoints
- **Rationale:** Improved security and better third-party integration support
- **Impact:** All clients must update authentication implementation

### 4. Rate Limiting Policy Updates
- **Free Tier:** 1,000 requests/hour
- **Paid Tier:** 10,000 requests/hour
- **Implementation:** Enforced at gateway level with proper header responses

---

## Decisions Made

| # | Decision | Owner | Deadline |
|---|----------|-------|----------|
| 1 | Deprecate v1 endpoints by June 30, 2026 | Sarah | Q2 2026 |
| 2 | Implement OAuth2 + JWT for v2.3 | Mike | Sprint 8 |
| 3 | Deploy new rate limiting policies | Tom | Before v2.3 release |
| 4 | Maintain v2.2 backward compatibility | Team | Until v1 EOL |

---

## Action Items

| Action Item | Assignee | Due Date | Status |
|-------------|----------|----------|--------|
| Draft API migration guide for clients | Mike | March 27, 2026 | Pending |
| Update frontend SDK to support v2.3 auth | Lisa | April 3, 2026 | Pending |
| Set up staging environment for v2.3 testing | Tom | March 25, 2026 | Pending |
| Communicate deprecation plan to stakeholders | Sarah | March 28, 2026 | Pending |

---

## Next Steps

1. **Week of March 24:** Complete staging environment setup
2. **Week of March 31:** Begin SDK updates and migration guide drafting
3. **April 2026:** Stakeholder communication and client notification
4. **Q2 2026:** Monitor migration progress and provide support

---

**Notes Taken by:** Alex Zhang  
**Meeting Record Created:** March 24, 2026

arguments.content:
# Weekly Technical Report

**Report Period:** March 17-23, 2026  
**Team:** Orion Tech Backend Team  
**Report Date:** March 24, 2026  
**Prepared by:** Alex Zhang

---

## Executive Summary

This week focused on Sprint 8 planning, API v2.3 preparation, and addressing technical debt discovered in CI/CD pipelines. Key achievements include finalizing the API versioning strategy, completing performance benchmarks, and establishing the deprecation timeline for legacy v1 endpoints.

---

## Completed Items

| # | Item | Status | Owner | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|-------|
| 1 | CI Build Report Fixes | ✅ Complete | Mike | Resolved timezone inconsistencies in build artifacts |
| 2 | API Performance Benchmarks | ✅ Complete | Sarah | Completed v2.2 endpoint performance testing |
| 3 | API Review Meeting | ✅ Complete | Sarah | Finalized v2.3 roadmap and deprecation plan |
| 4 | Sprint 8 Technical Spec | ✅ Complete | Alex | Documented OAuth2, rate limiting, and migration modules |
| 5 | Technical Debt Inventory | ✅ Complete | Team | Identified and prioritized 9 debt items |

---

## Issues Encountered

| # | Issue | Severity | Impact | Resolution |
|---|-------|----------|--------|------------|
| 1 | Timezone Inconsistencies in Reports | Medium | CI artifacts show mixed timezones (UTC, local, +08:00) | Standardization plan drafted, implementation scheduled |
| 2 | P1 Validation Gap - Empty Time Fields | High | Reports failing schema validation | Automated validation to be implemented |
| 3 | File Naming Convention Violations | Medium | 45% of legacy files use non-standard naming | Migration script pending DevOps approval |
| 4 | Legacy v1 API Maintenance Burden | High | Increasing technical debt in deprecated endpoints | Deprecation timeline established (EOL: June 30, 2026) |

---

## Key Metrics

| Metric | Value | Target | Status |
|--------|-------|--------|--------|
| API Uptime | 99.97% | 99.95% | ✅ Exceeds |
| Average Response Time | 45ms | <50ms | ✅ Passes |
| Error Rate | 0.02% | <0.1% | ✅ Passes |
| Sprint Velocity | 42 points | 40 points | ✅ Exceeds |

---

## Technical Decisions

| Decision | Rationale | Date | Stakeholders |
|----------|-----------|------|--------------|
| Adopt URL Path Versioning | Clear versioning, easy routing, machine-readable | Mar 23 | Sarah, Mike, Lisa, Tom |
| OAuth2 + JWT for v2.3 | Improved security, industry standard | Mar 23 | API Review Meeting |
| v1 Deprecation by June 30, 2026 | 3-month migration window for clients | Mar 23 | API Review Meeting |
| Rate Limiting: 1k/10k/100k tiers | Align with pricing tiers, prevent abuse | Mar 23 | API Review Meeting |

---

## Next Week's Plan (March 24-30, 2026)

| Priority | Task | Owner | ETA |
|----------|------|-------|-----|
| P0 | Implement OAuth2 JWT authentication module | Mike | Mar 28 |
| P0 | Set up v2.3 staging environment | Tom | Mar 25 |
| P1 | Draft API migration guide | Mike | Mar 27 |
| P1 | Update frontend SDK for v2.3 auth | Lisa | Apr 3 |
| P2 | Complete timezone standardization | Mike | Mar 28 |

---

## Risks and Blockers

| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|------------|--------|------------|
| Client migration delays | Medium | High | Early communication, migration guide, support channel |
| OAuth2 implementation complexity | Medium | Medium | Spikes completed, library selected (golang-jwt) |
| Staging environment delays | Low | High | Tom assigned, target Mar 25 |

---

## Notes

- API v2.3 development officially kicked off on March 23
- Technical debt tracking process now in place with weekly reviews
- Team velocity trending above target, Sprint 8 on track
- Client communication regarding v1 deprecation scheduled for next week

---

**Next Report:** March 31, 2026

arguments.content:
{
  "recipient": "product@oriontech.com",
  "subject": "API v2.3.0 Release & v1 Deprecation Notice - Action Required",
  "body": "Hi Product Team,

We're writing to inform you of upcoming changes to our API that will affect client integrations and require coordination with our customers.

## Key Changes

### 1. API v2.3.0 Release (Target: April 2026)
- **New Authentication:** OAuth2 with JWT tokens will be required for all v2.3 endpoints
- **Rate Limiting Updates:** New tiers - 1,000 req/hour (free), 10,000 req/hour (paid), 100,000 req/hour (enterprise)
- **Breaking Changes:** API keys will no longer be accepted for v2.3+ endpoints

### 2. API v1 Deprecation
- **Sunset Date:** June 30, 2026
- **Impact:** All v1 endpoints will be permanently disabled
- **Migration Window:** 3 months for clients to migrate to v2.2 or v2.3

## Action Items for Product Team

1. **Customer Communication:** Please prepare customer-facing announcements
2. **Documentation Updates:** API docs need updates for new auth flow
3. **Support Preparation:** Support team should be trained on migration FAQs

## Resources

- Migration Guide: [Link - Draft by Mar 27]
- v2.3 API Documentation: [Link - Available Apr 1]
- Technical Support: backend-team@oriontech.com

## Timeline

| Milestone | Date |
|-----------|------|
| Migration Guide Published | March 27, 2026 |
| Staging Environment Available | March 25, 2026 |
| v2.3 Production Release | April 15, 2026 |
| v1 End-of-Life | June 30, 2026 |

Please let us know if you need any clarification or would like to schedule a walkthrough of the changes.

Best regards,
Orion Tech Backend Team

---
This email was drafted on March 24, 2026. Please review before sending to customers.",
  "priority": "high",
  "scheduled_send_at": "2026-03-25T09:00:00+08:00"
}
